task_objective: Implement commit 1 of the refresh_games Ludusavi call optimization plan by eliminating unnecessary alias/config-show reloads when the Ludusavi config mtime is unchanged.
design_decisions: Kept the public refresh_games RPC and adapter method signatures unchanged.
Cached aliases only when a concrete Ludusavi config mtime is available.
Reused service aliases during forced status refreshes when the config marker is unchanged.
Did not implement ThreadPoolExecutor status parallelism in this commit; that remains commit 2.

results.red_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_adapter_cache.py tests/test_service.py::test_refresh_games_reuses_aliases_when_config_marker_is_unchanged tests/test_service.py::test_refresh_games_reloads_aliases_when_config_marker_changes failed before implementation on repeated config_show and alias reload
